zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Hampden於1426年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾時，她的父親Sir John Hampden29歲，母親Elizabeth Whalesborough24歲。她於1446年與Nicholas Iwardby在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾艾維比結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1466年12月8日在英國巴金哈姆爾格亞特 米森登享年40歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾格亞特 米森登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Hampden于1426年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾时，她的父亲Sir John Hampden29岁，母亲Elizabeth Whalesborough24岁。她于1446年与Nicholas Iwardby在英国英格兰林可爾史爾艾維比结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1466年12月8日在英国巴金哈姆爾格亞特 米森登享年40岁，埋葬在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾格亞特 米森登。

nameMeanings.name: Hampden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Great or Little Hampden (Bucks).

variants.name: Hamden
meanings: English (Kent and Berkshire): habitational name from Hamden in Smarden, Kent, or from Great or Little Hampden in Buckinghamshire.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Hampden was born in 1426, in Buckinghamshire, England, her father, Sir John Hampden, was 29 and her mother, Elizabeth Whalesborough, was 24. She married Nicholas Iwardby in 1446, in Ewerby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 8 December 1466, in Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 40, and was buried in Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Hampden est née en 1426, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Hampden, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Whalesborough, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas Iwardby en 1446, à Ewerby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 8 décembre 1466, à Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterrée à Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Hampden è nata il nel 1426 nel Buckinghamshire, England, sua padre, Sir John Hampden, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Whalesborough, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Nicholas Iwardby nel 1446, nel Ewerby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Hampdenが1426年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John Hampdenは29歳，母Elizabeth Whalesboroughは24歳であった。1446年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアエウエルビーでNicholas Iwardbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1466年12月8日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアグレアト ミセンデンで40歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアグレアト ミセンデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Hampden(이)가 1426년 영국 벅잉함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Hampden(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Whalesborough(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1446년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 워비에서 Nicholas Iwardby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1466년 12월 8일 영국 벅잉함실르 그리트 미센든에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 그리트 미센든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Hampden nasceu em 1426, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Hampden, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Whalesborough, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Nicholas Iwardby em 1446, em Ewerby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 8 de dezembro de 1466, em Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 40 anos, e foi sepultada em Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Hampden родилась в 1426 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Hampden было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Whalesborough, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas Iwardby в 1446 г. в местности ювирби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 8 декабря 1466 г. в местности грит миссенден, буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 40 лет и была похоронена в местности грит миссенден, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.
